title: Mukbang YouTuber Yuno apologizes after plane food ordering video sparks backlash
summary_full: Mukbang creator Yuno apologized after backlash for a long-haul flight video. He filmed himself ordering food more than twenty times during the fifteen-hour journey. Viewers criticized Yuno for creating extra work for flight attendants and disturbing passengers. The YouTuber deleted the video and admitted his decision was poor and inconsiderate. This incident sparked discussions about influencer responsibility in public spaces.
